ties
near-separation

minimal version bounds validation)

mixins

success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Import-based adapter strategy was feasible (import feasibility 0.94, low intrusiveness risk), enabling rapid MCP wrapping.
Generated MCP service started healthy over stdio and plugin tests passed.
Repository structure was analyzable via zip fallback despite DeepWiki failure.
failure_reasons: DeepWiki analysis failed (non-blocking) and reduced enrichment quality.
Original project tests were not validated as passing (original_project.passed=false, empty details), creating confidence gaps in behavioral parity.
Metrics instrumentation appears incomplete (0 for LOC/size/resource/perf metrics), limiting evidence-based quality assessment.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully; repo imported via zip fallback (86 files). Exact per-node timing not provided.
node_performance.analysis_time: Completed successfully; medium complexity identified with broad AST-discovered API surface. DeepWiki sub-step failed but analysis continued.
node_performance.generation_time: Completed successfully; MCP scaffold and adapter files generated, but reported generated LOC/size/tool count fields are inconsistent with actual endpoint list.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin health checks passed; original project test validation was effectively not executed/recorded (execution_time=0, no test files).

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Undetermined due to missing telemetry (reported 0 MB).
resource_usage.disk_usage: Low-to-moderate footprint expected from small generated scaffold; reported size metrics are missing/inaccurate.
